summary: Comprehensive testing completed for WordPress to Static Deployer MVP. All backend APIs and frontend pages working perfectly with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Backend API - Root endpoint returns correct response
Backend API - Stats endpoint returns proper empty state data structure
Backend API - Profiles CRUD operations (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Backend API - Schedules and History endpoints return empty arrays
Backend API - Crawler endpoints accept requests and return job IDs
Backend API - Compare endpoints (content and files) work correctly
Backend API - Error handling returns proper 404 responses
Frontend - Dashboard loads with correct stats grid and navigation
Frontend - Site Profiles page shows created profiles and form works
Frontend - Deploy page has functional site selector, crawl, and deploy buttons
Frontend - Compare page has working Visual Diff and File Diff tabs
Frontend - Schedules page shows empty state and dialog forms work
Frontend - History page displays proper empty state
Frontend - All navigation between pages works seamlessly
Integration - API data correctly displays in UI (profiles, stats)
Integration - Profile creation via UI successfully calls backend APIs
Integration - Crawl functionality starts job and shows real-time logs
Integration - Compare functionality retrieves and displays content
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all pages and features functional)
